title: CONTACT ME - The Right Honourable Angela Rayner MP
meta_description: Representing Ashton-under-Lyne (including Audenshaw, Droylsden and Dukinfield)
text_excerpt: CONTACT ME - The Right Honourable Angela Rayner MP Skip to main content The Right Honourable Angela Rayner MP Representing Ashton-under-Lyne (including Audenshaw, Droylsden and Dukinfield) Join Get Involved Donate HOME ABOUT ME CONTACT ME NEWS More Search Search the website Search Menu CONTACT ME The Rt. Hon. Angela Rayner MP, representing Ashton-under-Lyne (including Audenshaw, Droylsden and Dukinfield) If you are a constituent, you can get in touch with me using the form below . Alternatively: WRITE TO ME at Ashton Market Hall, Market Street, Ashton-under-Lyne OL6 7JU CALL ME on 0161 342 5800 EMAIL ME at angela.rayner.mp@parliament.uk Please include your name, phone number and full postal address. Unfortunately, due to strict parliamentary protocol, I am only able to deal with enquiries from constituents of mine in Ashton-under-Lyne, Audenshaw, Droylsden and Dukinfield. You can check if you are a constituent of mine here http://www.theyworkforyou.com/mp/ In order for me to reply to you and undertake any representations on your behalf, I must have: . Your full name . Your full postal address, including post code . Your contact telephone number(s) Please email me again with the above information if you did not include them the first time. Thank you again for getting in touch. CASEWORK My job in Westminster is to speak up for my constituents in the House of Commons, to scrutinise laws and to attend Parliamentary debates and committees. I also have a role locally, supporting local people and community groups, raising and publicising local issues. As your local MP, I can help constituents on a range of issues. Unfortunately, there are some things I cannot do:- I cannot interfere with decisions made by the courts. I cannot help with private disputes. I cannot help with legal matters. I cannot obtain preferential treatment for you or get results outside of the law. Local council There are many issues which should first be taken up directly with the local authority responsible or with your local councillor. You can find your local councillor here: Your Councillors (moderngov.co.uk) If your complaint to the council is not dealt with to your satisfaction, you can contact the Local Government Ombudsman – www.lgo.org.uk Immigration and asylum cases You should first approach the Citizens Advice Bureau: Citizens Advice Tameside – Free, confidential and impartial advice (tamesidecab.org.uk) It is not an MP’s role to offer legal advice. As your local MP, I can chase up the status of your outstanding application if you have not received a response within the given timescale. However, I am unable to alter or influence the process and procedure set out by the Home Office. For more information, please contact the Home Office directly – www.gov.uk/government/organisations/home-office CONTACT FORM FULL NAME * STREET ADDRESS * TOWN * POSTCODE * EMAIL ADDRESS * SUBJECT * MESSAGE * The Right Honourable Angela Rayner MP Contact details Ashton Market Hall, Market Street, Ashton-under-Lyne OL6 7JU Ashton Market Hall, Market Street, Ashton-under-Lyne OL6 7JU '> View on Google Maps Email: angela.rayner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Andrew McLaren as Campaign Co-ordinator on behalf of the Ashton-under-Lyne Constituency Labour Party, at 7 Wilson Crescent, Ashton-under-Lyne, OL6 9SA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
